# Vexel Display Emulator

## Running

Extract the ZIP archieve and run 'emulator.exe'

No installation is required.

## Requirements

- Windows 10 or newer
- x64 processor

## Controls

- 'Space' - Pause / resume animation
- 'Up' - Increase animation playback speed
- 'Down' - Decrease animation playback speed
- 'Left' - Cycle animation colours (procedural animations only)
- 'Right' - Cycle animations

## About

The Vexel Display Emulator is a C++ application that simulates an LED display panel.

It is used to develop and test framebuffer-based animations in a virtual environment. The emulator will also provide a development environment for testing the React application used to control and manage LED panel displays.

## Included Files

Do not remove 'SDL2.dll', it is required for the emulator to run.

## Documentation

For source code, architecture documentation, and development information:

https://github.com/Avextro/Vexel-Display
